name: DynamicPage
description: Primary page container for List Report and Worklist floorplans. Provides the collapsible header pattern: the header (DynamicPageHeader) collapses as the user scrolls, while the title (DynamicPageTitle) remains always visible. The title slot is mandatory; the header slot is present only on List Report, absent on Worklist.

props.name: headerExpanded
props.description: Initial expansion state of the collapsible header. Default true (expanded). Set false to start with the header collapsed.

props.name: toggleHeaderOnTitleClick
props.description: When true (default), the user can expand or collapse the header by clicking the title area.

props.name: preserveHeaderStateOnScroll
props.description: When true, the header stays open even when the user scrolls down. Use sparingly — the collapsible pattern is a key Fiori UX behavior.

props.name: fitContent
props.description: CRITICAL: Set true when the content slot contains a Table. Without this, the table does not fill the remaining viewport height and whitespace appears below it.

props.name: showFooter
props.description: Shows the sticky footer slot. Set true only for the draft save pattern (Save/Discard buttons). Never use the footer for informational content.

events.name: pinnedStateChange
events.description: Fired when the header pinned state changes.

slots.name: title
slots.description: REQUIRED. The always-visible sticky title area. Contains page heading, breadcrumbs, variant management toggle, and page-level action buttons.

slots.name: header
slots.description: CONDITIONAL. Present on list-report and analytical-list-page floorplans (contains FilterBar). MUST be absent on worklist floorplan — this is the structural differentiator between the two.

slots.name: content
slots.description: REQUIRED. The main scrollable content area. Typically a Table or Form. Set fitContent=true when the content is a Table.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Sticky footer for finalising actions only (Save draft, Submit, Discard). Never use for informational content or navigation.

notes: title slot is mandatory — DynamicPage renders incorrectly without DynamicPageTitle.
header slot MUST be absent on worklist floorplan. MUST be present on list-report.
FilterBar belongs inside DynamicPageHeader (header slot) — never in the content slot.
DynamicPage and ObjectPageLayout are peer containers — never nest one inside the other.
fitContent must be true when content is sap.m.Table to fill viewport height correctly.
footer slot is for finalising actions only (Save/Discard draft) — never informational.

keyboard: Enter/Space — toggle header expand/collapse when title is focused
notes: The page title in DynamicPageTitle must have a heading level (H1 recommended for the main page).
The collapsible header transition is announced to screen readers automatically.

examples.title: Worklist screen (no header slot)
whenToUse: As the root page container for Worklist and List Report floorplans
When the screen requires a collapsible header with sticky title
whenNotToUse: For Object Page floorplan — use sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout instead
For simple single-section forms without a collapsible header — use sap.m.Page

examples.title: List Report screen (with header and FilterBar)
whenToUse: List Report: user needs to filter a large open dataset before seeing results
whenNotToUse: Worklist: user processes their own pre-scoped task queue — no header slot, no FilterBar
